chapter_title.en: Seeking the Place to Relieve Oneself and the Etiquettes of Entering and Exiting

text: 61 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ مَنْ تَكَلَّمَ عَلَى اَلْخَلاَءِ لَمْ تُقْضَ حَاجَتُهُ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.61 - It has been narrated:
"Whoever speaks while in the restroom will not have his needs fulfilled”.
